race.comment: Tricky. WOLVES' DEN (6) resumes and could be a sharp improver. He debuted in a strong 2yo race in town behind Exit who has turned out to be very handy. Didn't fire on that occasion and has been given a length spell, look for a much better run. IMPACTICAL (3) is building nicely this time in, just finding one better at Hamilton last time out. Sets up well from the inside and can go one better. THE QUIET IMMORTAL (5) has been solid in two runs back and will be better for them. He turns around quickly here and should be ready to peak. CIRQUE DE COCO (12) has been good in two runs to date despite starting big odds each time. Up to 1400m looks ideal, she warrants far greater respect now and should take catching from out wide. SHEZOUS (11) is a Zoustar filly on debut for the Busuttin & Young camp who can run well first time out.
